author: mj12albert
body:
Example: https://deploy-preview-2137--base-ui.netlify.app/experiments/forms/rhf (change `validationMode` in the settings panel)

Using `onSubmit` validation, errors are not displayed until the first (unsuccessful) submission. After that RHF lets you configure `revalidateMode`, but we could possibly come up with a good opinionated behavior.

This would provide an option that's even less noisy than `onBlur` validation and closer to a native form submission: https://adamsilver.io/blog/the-problem-with-live-validation-and-what-to-do-instead/
title: [form] Support `validationMode: onSubmit`
